summary: Iteration 105 - Testing Order Notifications System and Comprehensive Report Filters. All features tested and working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test notifications created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order Notifications API is fully functional. Comprehensive Report filters are working correctly. Net profit card visibility is controlled by showBreakEvenReport setting.

verified: Date filter 'من تاريخ' (start date) is present and functional
Date filter 'إلى تاريخ' (end date) is present and functional
Changing dates updates the report data correctly
Date range displayed in header (e.g., 2026-01-01 - 2026-02-25)
Branch filter dropdown is present
Shows 'جميع الفروع' (All Branches) option
Branch icon (Building2) displayed next to filter
Filter is functional and updates report data

3_net_profit_card_visibility.description: بطاقة صافي الربح تظهر عند تفعيل صلاحية تقرير التحليل
verified: Net profit card (صافي الربح) is visible when showBreakEvenReport = true
Card shows profit amount and profit margin percentage
Grid layout changes from 3 columns to 2 columns when showBreakEvenReport = false
Code correctly checks: showBreakEvenReport !== false
Creates cashier notification for all order types
Creates driver notification only for delivery orders with driver_id
Returns success: true with notification IDs
Stores all order details (order_id, order_number, branch_id, etc.)
Filters by branch_id for cashier notifications
Filters by driver_id for driver notifications
Filters by notification_type (new_order_cashier, new_order_driver)
Returns notifications array with count and unread_count
Successfully marks notification as read (is_read: true)
Returns success: true with Arabic message
Returns 404 for non-existent notification ID
Unread count decreases after marking as read

7_pos_notification_integration.description: إرسال إشعارات عند حفظ طلب جديد في POS
verified: sendOrderNotification imported from orderNotifications.js
Called in handleSubmitOrder (line 779) when confirming order
Called in handlePrintBill (line 899) when printing bill
Sends order details including branch_id, driver_id, items, etc.

notes: Date filters properly implemented with Input type='date'
Branch filter uses Select component with Building2 icon
Net profit card visibility controlled by showBreakEvenReport prop
Grid layout dynamically adjusts based on showBreakEvenReport
Notification cleanup endpoint for old notifications
sendOrderNotification helper function for POS integration
Sends complete order data including items and notes
